author: gb9t
content:
Iter Phase C continues — 2 more high-impact Tier-3s (KVM x86 LAPIC + iommufd IOAS):

- virt/kvm/x86-lapic.md: covers arch/x86/kvm/lapic.c (~3600 lines) — in-kernel LAPIC + x2APIC + posted-interrupts wiring (KVM x86 hot path on every IRQ injection): per-vCPU struct kvm_lapic with 4KB MMIO register space (xAPIC mode @ 0xfee00000) OR MSR-based access (x2APIC mode), full per-Intel-SDM register set (ID/VER/TPR/APR/PPR/EOI/RRD/LDR/DFR/SVR/ISR/TMR/IRR/ESR/ICR/LVT/Timer), per-vCPU IRR/ISR 256-bit bitmaps, IPI delivery via ICR write with shorthand+delivery-mode+dest-mode+dest-field, lowest-priority delivery via PPR comparison, AVIC mode (AMD direct-IPI no-vmexit) via per-vCPU AVIC backing page, posted-interrupts (Intel direct-MSI via per-vCPU PID descriptor with PIR/SN/ON bits), TSC-deadline timer mode via host hrtimer + per-vCPU TSC offset translation, KVM_GET/SET_LAPIC 1024-byte snapshot for live-migration. 12 REQ / 8 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (UAF + IRR/ISR-OOB + vector-priority-consistent + PID-UAF) / Layer-2 ref to lapic_injection.tla + posted_intr.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus IPI round-trip.
- drivers/iommu/iommufd-ioas.md: covers iommufd/{ioas,io_pagetable,pages,iova_bitmap,double_span}.{c,h} (~4700 lines) — IOAS modern userspace abstraction: per-IOAS struct iommufd_ioas with software pagetable (rb-tree of IoptArea), per-source-page-array refcounted IoptPages (USER/FILE/DMABUF backing), iopt_pages refcount sharing on IOMMU_IOAS_COPY (no re-pin), iopt_area per-iova-range with iommu_prot, IOMMU_IOAS_MAP/MAP_FILE/MAP_DMABUF/COPY/UNMAP/IOVA_RANGES/ALLOW_IOVAS/CHANGE_PROCESS commands, per-process RLIMIT_MEMLOCK accounting, dirty-page tracking via iova_bitmap for VFIO live-migration (IOMMU_HWPT_GET_DIRTY_BITMAP), per-vendor SLADE/HWDirty integration via iopt_set_dirty_tracking + read_and_clear_dirty_data. 12 REQ / 7 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (IOAS-UAF + IoptPages-UAF + iova-uniqueness + npinned-overflow) / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus map↔unmap round-trip.

Total state: 268 .design docs, 100 Tier-2 + 34 Tier-3s. Foundation Tier-3 set (34): + x86-lapic + iommufd-ioas.

Knowledge pages: design-virt-kvm-x86-lapic, design-drivers-iommu-iommufd-ioas.

Next iter plan: drivers/iommu/iommufd-hwpt.md (Hardware Page Table object — paging + nested) + virt/kvm/memslots.md (KVM memory slots + RCU mgmt + HVA/GPA translation foundation).
